name: FIDELITY D & D BANCORP INC
summary: Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. is a Pennsylvania bank holding company headquartered in Dunmore, PA, whose wholly-owned subsidiary, The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank, has operated since 1903. The Bank offers traditional banking services including residential real estate, consumer, commercial and commercial real estate loans, personal and corporate trust services, and alternative financial and insurance products with asset management services across Lackawanna, Luzerne, and Northampton counties in Pennsylvania.
